name: nexus
description: A GitHub Copilot Chat agent that reads your GitHub and GitLab repository READMEs to provide up-to-date information

chatParticipants.name: nexus
chatParticipants.description: Answers questions about your GitHub and GitLab repositories based on their README files

commands.name: readme
commands.description: Show the README for a specific repository (e.g. /readme owner/repo)

commands.name: refresh
commands.description: Clear the README cache and fetch fresh content on the next query

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show available commands and current settings

commands.name: generate-readme
commands.description: Analyze the open workspace and generate a README.md

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Generate changelog entries from current branch diff

commands.title: Nexus: Set GitHub Personal Access Token
Nexus: Set GitLab Personal Access Token
Nexus: Clear GitHub Personal Access Token
Nexus: Clear GitLab Personal Access Token
Nexus: Save Generated Content to File

nexus.enableGithub.markdownDescription: Enable the **GitHub** provider. When enabled, Nexus will fetch READMEs from the repositories listed in `#nexus.repositories#` using your GitHub Personal Access Token.

nexus.enableGitlab.markdownDescription: Enable the **GitLab** provider. When enabled, Nexus will fetch READMEs from the repositories listed in `#nexus.gitlabRepositories#` using your GitLab Personal Access Token.

nexus.repositories.markdownDescription: List of **GitHub** repositories to monitor (requires `#nexus.enableGithub#`). Format: `owner/repo` — e.g. `microsoft/vscode`.

nexus.gitlabRepositories.markdownDescription: List of **GitLab** repositories to monitor (requires `#nexus.enableGitlab#`). Format: `namespace/project` — e.g. `gitlab-org/gitlab`.

nexus.gitlabUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL of your GitLab instance (requires `#nexus.enableGitlab#`). Change this for self-hosted GitLab deployments.

nexus.cacheTimeoutSeconds.markdownDescription: How long (in seconds) to cache README content before re-fetching. Set to `0` to always fetch fresh content.

nexus.baseBranch.markdownDescription: Base branch for **changelog** generation. The `/changelog` command compares the current branch against this branch. Falls back to auto-detecting `main` or `master` if not found.
